summary: Voice Cloning feature testing completed. All 10 backend API tests passed. All 6 frontend UI tests passed via Playwright. Clone Voice button, Voice Clone modal, Voice Settings modal all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Voice cloning integration is complete and working correctly
VoiceCloneModal component properly handles file upload (1-5 MP3/WAV files), voice name, and description
VoiceSettingsModal component shows preset voices from ElevenLabs, cloned voices list, and voice tuning sliders (Stability, Similarity, Style)
Backend endpoints: GET /api/voices/presets returns 10 ElevenLabs preset voices, GET /api/voices/cloned returns user's cloned voices
POST /api/voices/clone requires Pro+ subscription tier (returns 403 for lower tiers)
PUT /api/agents/{id}/voice correctly updates agent voice settings and validates cloned voice ownership
Agent cards show voice settings indicator with Settings icon button (data-testid='voice-settings-{agent_id}')
Clone Voice button visible in Agents page header (data-testid='clone-voice-btn')
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice cloning feature fully tested. Backend endpoints at lines 5954-6150 in server.py. Frontend components: VoiceCloning.jsx (VoiceCloneModal, VoiceSettingsModal), integrated in App.js Agents component at lines 2200-2504. Key data-testids: clone-voice-btn, voice-settings-{agent_id}. ElevenLabs API key is configured and working.

backend_apis.GET /api/voices/cloned: Returns user's cloned voices (empty for test user) - PASS
backend_apis.POST /api/voices/clone: Requires files and voice_name, validates subscription tier - PASS

frontend_ui.agents_page_loads: Agents page loads with Clone Voice button visible - PASS
frontend_ui.clone_voice_modal: Modal opens with Voice Name input, Description input, File upload area, Tips section - PASS
frontend_ui.voice_settings_modal: Modal opens with Voice Type selection (Preset/Cloned), Preset voice list, Voice tuning sliders, Preview button - PASS
frontend_ui.agent_card_voice_indicator: Agent cards show voice type indicator with Settings button - PASS

authentication.endpoints_require_auth: All voice endpoints require Bearer token - PASS

console_warnings: Failed to fetch trial status: TypeError: Failed to fetch - This is a minor issue during page navigation, does not affect voice cloning functionality
